---
title: "CV"
---

You can download my full CV as a PDF below.

[<a href="cv.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" style="background:#4a6fa5;border-color:#4a6fa5;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:0.9rem;">⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>]{.download-btn}

---

*Alternatively, a selected overview is provided below.*

::: {.section-title}
Education
:::

**[Degree, e.g., Ph.D. in Political Science]** *(expected [Year])*
[University Name], [City, Country]
Dissertation: *"[Title or Placeholder]"*
Committee: [Advisor Name], [Member], [Member]

**[M.A. / B.A. / etc.]** ([Year])
[University Name], [City, Country]

::: {.section-title}
Research & Employment
:::

**[Position Title]** · [Institution] · [Year–Year]

**[Position Title]** · [Institution] · [Year–Year]

::: {.section-title}
Publications
:::

See the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Teaching Experience
:::

See the [Teaching](teaching.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Fellowships & Awards
:::

- [Award / Fellowship Name] · [Institution] · [Year]
- [Award / Fellowship Name] · [Institution] · [Year]

::: {.section-title}
Conference Presentations
:::

- "[Paper Title]." [Conference Name]. [City]. [Year].
- "[Paper Title]." [Conference Name]. [City]. [Year].

::: {.section-title}
Skills
:::

**Methods:** [e.g., Regression analysis, Survey experiments, Qualitative interviews]

**Software:** [e.g., R, Stata, Python, QGIS]

**Languages:** [e.g., Spanish (native), English (fluent), Portuguese (proficient)]
